---
anchor-sections: false
---

::: page-content
# [Presentations and Projects]{style="color:#440712; display:block; text-align:center;"}

## [Presentations]{style="color:#7A0C2D; display:block; text-align:center;text-decoration:underline;"}

### Determinants of Self-Reported Coronary Artery Disease Prevalence Among U.S. Adults.

**Abstract Poster Presentation**\
*American Public Health Association Annual Meeting*\
Washington, D.C.\| November 2025\

### USGBC Women in Green Georgia Panel

**Panelist**\
*United States Green Building Council Women in Green Georgia*\
Atlanta, GA \| September 2025

```{=html}
<img src="paris-silone-stroud-women-in-green-panel.jpeg"
     alt="Paris Stroud speaking on the USGBC Women in Green Georgia Panel in Atlanta" 
     width="200" 
     style="display:block; margin:20px auto 30px auto; border:6px solid #ADB951; border-radius:15px;" />\
```

### Bridging Environmental and Public Health: Partnerships for Positive Impact

**Speaker**\
*Green Sports Alliance Annual Meeting*\
Miami, FL \| June 2025\

```{=html}
<img src="paris-silone-stroud-green-sports-alliance-speaking.jpg"
     alt=" Paris Stroud Speaking at the 2025 Green Sports Alliance Summit in Miami" 
     width="200" 
     style="display:block;
     margin:20px auto 0 auto;
     border: 6px solid #ADB951; border-radius: 15px;"/>
```

<br>\
<br>

## [Projects]{style="color:#7A0C2D; display:block; text-align:center; text-decoration:underline;"}

### Digital Community Health Dashboard

*Center of Excellence on Environmental Health and Sustainability, Morehouse School of Medicine*\

Assisted in the maintenance of an interactive <a href="https://www.dashboard.communitieswhoknow.com/Home/" target="blank">dashboard</a> aggregating local public health data. Integrated data sets on demographics, health outcomes, and environmental indicators. Enhanced accessibility of public health insights for Atlanta community partners and residents.
:::
